summary: Completed comprehensive testing of APIXEL Agency website. Backend APIs working perfectly on localhost, frontend UI/UX functioning well, but external URL integration failing due to preview environment unavailability.

critical_bugs.issue: All API endpoints return 404 when accessed via external preview URL
critical_bugs.impact: Frontend cannot fetch data from backend APIs, blocking dynamic content

minor_issues.issue: Returns 403 instead of 401 for unauthorized access
minor_issues.impact: Minor - still correctly blocks unauthorized access

integration_issues.issue: Services not displaying on homepage due to API 404 errors
Contact form shows 'Failed to send message' due to API unavailability
Admin login shows 'Invalid credentials' due to API unavailability

passed_tests: Backend admin login with correct credentials (localhost)
Frontend page routing (Services, Blog, About, Contact)
Frontend contact form UI and validation
Frontend WhatsApp floating button with correct phone number
Frontend hero section with typewriter effect
Frontend dark luxury theme with correct colors
action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: External preview URL is unavailable (showing 'Preview Unavailable!!!' message). The Kubernetes ingress routing is not working properly. Backend APIs work perfectly on localhost but are not accessible via the external URL. This prevents frontend-backend integration testing. Need to fix the external URL mapping or provide alternative testing approach.
